# Committee Management

Add support for managing committees, committee members, positions, and goals. Allow teachers/admins to create committees, assign members and roles, and set committee goals. Committees should be linked to activities and events.

## Features
- Create/edit/delete committees
- Assign members and positions
- Set committee goals
- Link committees to events and activities

## Context
This will help organize activities and events by committee, and clarify roles and responsibilities.
